tagline: High-intensity, community-driven training in the heart of Phoenix.
headline: Train Harder. Recover Smarter. Get Results.
service_1_desc: Structured WODs led by certified coaches. Every class is scalable — whether you're brand new or a seasoned athlete, you'll get a great workout.
service_2_desc: One-on-one sessions with an Iron Peak coach focused entirely on your goals — strength, fat loss, performance, or injury prevention.
service_3_desc: Custom nutrition plans built around your body and your schedule. Stop guessing what to eat and start seeing real results.
about_text_1: Iron Peak CrossFit was founded in 2018 by Coach Marcus Webb — a 10-year CrossFit veteran and former Division I athlete. We built this gym because we believed Phoenix deserved a box with serious coaching and a real community.
about_text_2: We're not a globo gym. Everyone knows your name here. Every class, every rep counts.
testimonial_1_text: I joined with zero CrossFit experience. Six months later I've lost 22 lbs, I can do pull-ups, and I've made some of my best friends here. Iron Peak changed my life.
testimonial_2_text: Coach Marcus fixed my squat form in the first session and I've been pain-free ever since. The coaching here is a different level.
testimonial_3_text: The community at Iron Peak is what keeps me coming back every day. It feels like family. Best decision I ever made.
address: 1940 E Indian School Rd, Phoenix, AZ 85016
contact_heading: Try Iron Peak Free for a Week
contact_subheading: No commitment. No credit card. Just show up and see if this is for you.
